## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm tsc --noEmit` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] Tests added or updated for the change
- [ ] `README.md` updated if the public API changed
- [ ] No cookies, real profile data, or other PII committed
